description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The pdf job runs in the default test stage, uses the blang/latex Docker image, executes "latexmk -shell-escape -pdf skript.tex uebung*.tex sloesung*.tex archimedes*.tex beweistechniken.tex" to compile LaTeX sources, and saves all "*.pdf" files as artifacts. The pages job runs in the deploy stage, depends on the pdf job, runs "mkdir .public", then "cp -r * .public", and finally "mv .public public", publishing the resulting public/ directory as a pages artifact, and it is limited to the master branch only. No additional caches, services, or global images are defined.
